vision_app.comment: Path to the vision counter's OWN python.exe (its own venv, with opencv/torch etc.) and its main.py

business_rules.comment: This section defines what kind of transaction an object entering/exiting the detection line represents. If your factory's real-world logic is reversed (e.g. entry = a manufactured product entering the warehouse, not a purchase from outside), change it here.

notifier.comment: channel can be: console | telegram | webhook. Fill in the values below to use Telegram.
